headline: Stock Market Today, June 12: EchoStar Falls as SpaceX-Linked Rally Meets DISH DBS Payment Risk
summary: EchoStar’s SpaceX-linked upside remains a draw, but investors are now focused on whether AT&T spectrum proceeds arrive in time to ease the DISH DBS payment pressure.
